channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: koala73/worldmonitor
item.description: 待翻译：Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
item.category: DevOps, 可观测性, 可视化

item.title: bojieli/ai-agent-book
item.description: 待翻译：《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码

item.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
item.description: 待翻译：Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.category: AI代理, 评估, 开发者工具, 可视化, 自动化

item.title: ayghri/i-have-adhd
item.description: 待翻译：A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.

item.title: earthtojake/text-to-cad
item.description: 待翻译：A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design

item.title: 1jehuang/jcode
item.description: 待翻译：The most intelligent agent harness for code

item.title: oblien/openship
item.description: 待翻译：Self-hosted deployment platform

item.title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
item.description: 待翻译：AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, 模型/LLM, 编辑器插件

item.title: every-app/open-seo
item.description: 待翻译：Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

item.title: tradesdontlie/tradingview-mcp
item.description: 待翻译：AI-assisted TradingView chart analysis — connect Claude Code to your TradingView Desktop for personal workflow automation

item.title: AlexsJones/llmfit
item.description: 待翻译：Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

item.title: hyprwm/Hyprland
item.description: 待翻译：Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks.

item.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
item.description: 待翻译：Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: 待翻译：Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: langchain-ai/open_deep_research
item.description: 待翻译：langchain-ai/open_deep_research

item.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
item.description: 待翻译：Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors

item.title: agegr/pi-web
item.description: 待翻译：Web UI for the pi coding agent

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: 待翻译：Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: microsoft/Ontology-Playground
item.description: 待翻译：Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

item.title: dottxt-ai/outlines
item.description: 待翻译：Structured Outputs

item.title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
item.description: 待翻译：The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.
